import sdp from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The package ships no default export, but an interop consumer can still author through a
// default import — the binding must extract exactly as the namespace spelling does (L2).
export const defaultImportBinding = sdp.codeAnchor({
  id: sdp.codeAnchorId("impl:orders.default-import-surface"),
  satisfies: sdp.ref("spec:orders.default-import-parent"),
});
